title: Update VISION.md directory tree to match actual file names
description: VISION.md architecture diagram references stale file names that map to real files with different names: (1) optimizer.js → matcher.js (profiles.js + matcher.js), (2) runtime/llm.js → server/brain.js (with engine/registry.js), (3) runtime/memory.js → store/index.js + runtime/embed.js. Also add engine/ directory (registry.js, init.js, ollama.js, cloud.js, whisper.js, tts.js) and config.js. This would improve vision match from 91% to ~95%+. Per CR-1775847503256.
